text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Leeet's see here. Lemons? Check! Teensy light
bulbs? Check! I bought everything I need for
science class!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Still, what the heck?! What is the teacher thinking
making a witch run herself ragged doing all this
shopping?!

text_block_list.name: Dog Walker
text_block_list.text: Um, excuse me! Can you grab that dog!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey, get your act together! You need to control
your familiar!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
That was an incredible burst of speed! It's like you
went from zero to a hundred in no time flat!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
You were just saying you were tired too! Is that
the power of magic?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ Well, sure it was! It's something us
witches work hard at every day.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean, the most important time to
pick up the speed and run is when I'm tired?
choice_data_list:
I want to work on the explosiveness of your
sprints.

I want to work on the explosiveness of your
sprints.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh... I guess Granny did always say that a witch shows her true worth when her magic runs short.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'll do it. But if it seems like you're
wasting my time, I'm outta here!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...
I guess it wasn't a waste of time after all.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Uh... Everything okay? Did something happen the
other day?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: N-no, nothing! Anyway, I'm heading home early!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
(Well, I guess that familiar is a little useful after
all. Just a little!)
